final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic illustration of the Tang Dynasty Chang'an Lantern Festival night scene (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: must be 工笔重彩长卷 (meticulous brushwork, heavy color, handscroll format)
Composition: must be panoramic wide-angle view capturing the entire cityscape of 长安城
Subject: must include ten thousand lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the night sky as the focal spectacle
Scene/backdrop: must include Tang Dynasty 长安城 cityscape at night during the Lantern Festival
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with warm lantern glow — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, saturated direction — exact pigment choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs traditional Chinese painting surface treatment — exact paper texture and brushstroke weight are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve Tang Dynasty 长安城 architectural accuracy and Lantern Festival cultural context
Avoid:
